scripts.build: tailwindcss -i ./public/style.css -o ./public/main.css --minify && tailwindcss -i ./public/style.explorer.css -o ./public/explorer.css --minify && tailwindcss -i ./public/style.admin.css -o ./public/admin.css --minify && tailwindcss -i ./public/style.share.css -o ./public/share.css --minify && node scripts/ensure-final-newline.mjs ./public/main.css ./public/explorer.css ./public/admin.css ./public/share.css && node scripts/stamp-asset-version.mjs && node --check ./public/index.js
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy public
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
